ops.title: Update gpt-5.6-sol routing policy in claude-rules.md
ops.description: Split the implementation lane by task shape per deep research: well-scoped/clearly-bounded/terminal-heavy implementation → gpt-5.6-sol xhigh fast via codex; ambiguous net-new, large multi-file refactors, long agentic runs stay opus xhigh. No fable lane moves. Ultra mode: exposed since codex 0.144.0 but unsanctioned (worst scope discipline, 3–5x cost); escalation stays fable. Propagates: claude-rules.md → cc-guides render → captain-hook general pack nudges + rubrics → codex skill lanes → repo-bootstrap reference docs + test assertions.

ops.text: claude-rules.md Models table shows the split implementation lane (sol gains well-scoped/bounded/terminal-heavy; opus keeps ambiguous/large/long) and ultra as not-a-retry-rung
repo-bootstrap pytest green with assertions updated to pin the new wording
captain-hook general pack nudges + all 5 rubric files updated together, pack version bumped, suite green
cc-skills CLAUDE.md re-rendered from the pushed guide (table byte-identical)
